[Western Baltic] GERMAN NAV WARN 193/26
010930 UTC APR 26
GERMAN NAVIGATIONAL WARNING NO. 193
WESTERN BALTIC. BIGHT OF MECKLENBURG.
MEASURING INSTRUMENTS ESTABLISHED
AND MARKED BY YELLOW LIGHTBUOYS WITH INSCRIPTION 'ODAS',
54-23,43N 011-22,97E,
54-22,56N 012-11,21E,
54-03,24N 011-18,47E,
SAFE BERTH REQUESTED
